---
title: "Week 2"
subtitle: "Data Wrangling and Relationships"
editor: visual
---

## Prepare

📖 Read [Ch. 3 in ModernDive](https://moderndive.com/v2/wrangling.html)

📖 Read [Ch. 3 in R for Data Science](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform.html)

## Lectures

🖥️ [Lecture 4 -](not-available-lec.html)[Data Wrangling I](not-avaliable-lec.html)[I](not-available-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 5 - Relationships I](not-avaliable-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 6 - Relationships II](not-avaliable-lec.html)

## Participation

📋

## Lab

⌨️ [Lab 2 - Data Wrangling II + Relationships](not-available.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
